title: Hello, World!
description: Print 'Hello, World!' to the console using a print block.

title: Sum Two Numbers
description: Create two variables, assign numbers to them, then print their sum.

title: FizzBuzz
description: Loop from 1 to 20. Print Fizz if divisible by 3, Buzz if by 5, FizzBuzz if by both, else the number.

title: Countdown
description: Use a while loop to print numbers from 10 down to 1, then print 'Blastoff!'.

title: Even or Odd
description: Ask for a number with input(), then print whether it is even or odd.

title: Factorial
description: Define a function that takes an integer n and returns n! (factorial). Call it with n=5 and print the result.

title: Reverse a String
description: Create a variable with any string, then print it reversed using a for loop.

title: Fibonacci Sequence
description: Print the first 10 numbers in the Fibonacci sequence using a loop.

title: Simple Calculator
description: Define functions for add, subtract, multiply, and divide. Call each with two numbers and print the results.

title: Word Counter
description: Define a function that takes a string and returns the number of words in it. Test it with a sentence.
